name: aso-score-mcp
description: ASO agent-readiness scanner. Tools: scan_site, check_signal, list_checks, get_fix_plan, get_aso_framework.

deployment.note: stdio (local, per-user) is the safe default. A public HTTP deployment MUST add authentication, per-client rate limiting, and an egress policy — the scanner makes outbound requests and would otherwise be abusable as a network scanner.

authentication.note: Required for any HTTP deployment; stdio runs under the local user and needs none.
